title: botrychium lanuginosum var. nepalense
intro: Botrychium lanuginosum var. nepalense, also known as Nepal lace fern, is a variety of the bear's foot fern, a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Botrychium lanuginosum var. nepalense include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically harvested and prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for use in herbal remedies.
